s1.title: Train at your pace
s1.body: Watch high-quality training videos, organized by category and ready when you are.

s2.title: Manuals at hand
s2.body: Browse, search and download PDF guides — available in English and Spanish.

s3.title: One app, all your devices
s3.body: Pick up where you left off across phone, tablet and web. Your progress travels with you.

auth.twoFactorScan: Scan this QR code in an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy).
auth.forgotSubtitle: We'll email you a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotSentBody: We sent a reset link to {{email}}. Open it from this device to set a new password.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Tap it to activate your account, then come back and sign in.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

videos.title: Training videos
videos.subtitle: Learn at your own pace
videos.empty: No videos in this category yet
videos.notesPlaceholder: Type your notes here. They're saved automatically and only visible to you.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find videos and manuals
search.startDesc: Search across all training videos and PDF manuals.

profile.title: Profile
profile.bookmarksEmptyDesc: Tap the bookmark icon on a video or manual to save it for later.
profile.deleteAccountWarning: This permanently removes your profile, sessions, and access to all content. This cannot be undone.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you were looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance
sections.body: By creating an account or using this app you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

sections.heading: 2. Your account
sections.body: You are responsible for keeping your credentials secure and for all activity in your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

sections.heading: 3. Content
sections.body: All training videos, manuals and materials provided through the app are licensed for personal, non-commercial use. You may not redistribute, resell or extract them.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable use
sections.body: Do not use the service to upload illegal content, harass other users, attempt to break or reverse-engineer the system, or scrape content automatically.

sections.heading: 5. Termination
sections.body: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time from Profile > Delete account.

sections.heading: 6. Disclaimer
sections.body: The service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.body: Questions about these terms? Reach us at legal@example.com.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
sections.body: We collect the data you provide at sign-up (name, email, country, optional phone), authentication metadata, and basic usage signals such as which videos and manuals you open.

sections.heading: 2. How we use it
sections.body: We use your data to authenticate you, personalize your experience, recommend training content and respond to support requests.

sections.heading: 3. Storage and security
sections.body: Data is stored with our backend provider (Supabase) under industry-standard encryption in transit and at rest. Sessions on mobile devices are stored in secure platform storage.

sections.heading: 4. Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your data. We share it only with processors necessary to run the service (authentication, hosting, storage).

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.body: You can edit your profile from the app, change your password, or delete your account permanently. Contact us to request a data export.

sections.heading: 6. Children
sections.body: This service is not directed to children under 13. If you believe a child has registered, contact us to have the account removed.
